query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.49 (commit: f408c888).

## Issue to Resolve

NPE on consecutive blank lines in end of file with class without body
<!-- The bug you're experiencing might have already been reported!
Please search in the [issues](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues) before creating one. -->

## Expected Behavior
Ktlint should report an error of `no-consecutive-blank-lines` violation

## Observed Behavior
NPE

```
~/workspace > vim dummy.kt                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             48s 16:32:07
~/workspace > ktlint dummy.kt                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           5s 16:32:18
dummy.kt:1:23: Internal Error (rule 'standard:no-consecutive-blank-lines') in dummy.kt at position '1:23. Please create a ticket at https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues and provide the source code that triggered an error.
com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleException: Rule 'standard:no-consecutive-blank-lines' throws exception in file 'dummy.kt' at position (1:23)
   Rule maintainer: KtLint
   Issue tracker  : https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues
   Repository     : https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRule(RuleExecutionContext.kt:64)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine$lint$3.invoke(KtLintRuleEngine.kt:100)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine$lint$3.invoke(KtLintRuleEngine.kt:99)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.VisitorProvider$visitor$3.invoke(VisitorProvider.kt:46)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.VisitorProvider$visitor$3.invoke(VisitorProvider.kt:44)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine.lint(KtLintRuleEngine.kt:99)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine.lint(KtlintCommandLine.kt:542)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine.process(KtlintCommandLine.kt:467)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine.access$process(KtlintCommandLine.kt:64)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine$lintFiles$3.invoke$lambda$0(KtlintCommandLine.kt:416)
	at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264)
	at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136)
	at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635)
	at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:833)
Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode.getElementType()" because the return value of "org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode.getTreeNext()" is null
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules.NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor(NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt:65)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules.NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.beforeVisitChildNodes(NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:92)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle-dhiVX_g(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:92)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:29)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:100)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:99)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle-dhiVX_g(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:99)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRule(RuleExecutionContext.kt:61)
	... 13 more
```

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Create a file with just :
```kotlin
sealed class Hello



```
2. run ktlint on the file


## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version of ktlint used: 0.49.0
* Relevant parts of the `.editorconfig` settings: None
* Name and version (or code for custom task) of integration used (Gradle plugin, Maven plugin, command line, custom Gradle task): CLI
* Version of Gradle used (if applicable): N/A
* Operating System and version: MacOS

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

content.thinking:
Let me analyze this issue. The NPE occurs in `NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt` at line 65 in the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor` method. The error message says:

"Cannot invoke "org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode.getElementType()" because the return value of "org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode.getTreeNext()" is null"

So the issue is that `getTreeNext()` returns null, and then we try to call `getElementType()` on it.

Let me first look at the relevant file to understand the code structure and find the bug.

content.text: Let me start by examining the relevant file to understand the root cause of the NPE.

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
 2→
 3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.CLASS
 4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IDENTIFIER
 5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
 6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextLeaf
 8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevCodeLeaf
 9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
10→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
11→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
12→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
13→
14→public class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule : StandardRule("no-consecutive-blank-lines") {
15→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
16→        node: ASTNode,
17→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
18→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
19→    ) {
20→        if (node is PsiWhiteSpace &&
21→            node.prevSibling != null
22→        ) {
23→            val text = node.getText()
24→            val newLineCount = text.count { it == '\n' }
25→            if (newLineCount < 2) {
26→                return
27→            }
28→
29→            val eof = node.nextLeaf() == null
30→            val betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor = node.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()
31→
32→            if (newLineCount > 2 || eof || betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
33→                val split = text.split("\n")
34→                val offset =
35→                    node.startOffset +
36→                        split[0].length +
37→                        split[1].length +
38→                        if (betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
39→                            1
40→                        } else {
41→                            2
42→                        }
43→                emit(offset, "Needless blank line(s)", true)
44→                if (autoCorrect) {
45→                    val newText =
46→                        buildString {
47→                            append(split.first())
48→                            append("\n")
49→                            if (!eof && !betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
50→                                append("\n")
51→                            }
52→                            append(split.last())
53→                        }
54→                    (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(newText)
55→                }
56→            }
57→        }
58→    }
59→
60→    private fun ASTNode.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor() =
61→        prevCodeLeaf()
62→            ?.let { prevNode ->
63→                prevNode.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
64→                    prevNode.treeParent.elementType == CLASS &&
65→                    this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
66→            }
67→            ?: false
68→}
69→
70→public val NO_CONSECUTIVE_BLANK_LINES_RULE_ID: RuleId = NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule().ruleId
71→

content.thinking:
Now I understand the issue. On line 65, `this.treeNext` is called and can be null when we're at the end of the file. For a class without a body like `sealed class Hello`, when there are consecutive blank lines at the end of the file:

1. The whitespace node containing the blank lines is being checked
2. `prevCodeLeaf()` returns the `IDENTIFIER` node ("Hello")
3. That identifier's parent is a CLASS node
4. But `this.treeNext` is null because we're at the end of the file

The fix is to add a null check for `treeNext` before calling `elementType` on it.

Let me check if there are any tests for this rule to understand the expected behavior better and to potentially add a test case.

content.text:
Now I understand the issue. On line 65, `this.treeNext` can be `null` when we're at the end of the file. For a class without a body like `sealed class Hello`, when there are consecutive blank lines at the end of the file:
1. The whitespace node containing the blank lines is being checked
2. `prevCodeLeaf()` returns the `IDENTIFIER` node ("Hello")
3. That identifier's parent is a CLASS node
4. But `this.treeNext` is null because we're at the end of the file, causing the NPE

Let me check the test file to understand the expected behavior and add a test case:

 7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextLeaf
 8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevCodeLeaf
 9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
10→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
11→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
12→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
13→
14→public class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule : StandardRule("no-consecutive-blank-lines") {
15→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
16→        node: ASTNode,
17→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
18→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
19→    ) {
20→        if (node is PsiWhiteSpace &&
21→            node.prevSibling != null
22→        ) {
23→            val text = node.getText()
24→            val newLineCount = text.count { it == '\n' }
25→            if (newLineCount < 2) {
26→                return
27→            }
28→
29→            val eof = node.nextLeaf() == null
30→            val betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor = node.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()
31→
32→            if (newLineCount > 2 || eof || betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
33→                val split = text.split("\n")
34→                val offset =
35→                    node.startOffset +
36→                        split[0].length +
37→                        split[1].length +
38→                        if (betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
39→                            1
40→                        } else {
41→                            2
42→                        }
43→                emit(offset, "Needless blank line(s)", true)
44→                if (autoCorrect) {
45→                    val newText =
46→                        buildString {
47→                            append(split.first())
48→                            append("\n")
49→                            if (!eof && !betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
50→                                append("\n")
51→                            }
52→                            append(split.last())
53→                        }
54→                    (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(newText)
55→                }
56→            }
57→        }
58→    }
59→
60→    private fun ASTNode.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor() =
61→        prevCodeLeaf()
62→            ?.let { prevNode ->
63→                prevNode.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
64→                    prevNode.treeParent.elementType == CLASS &&
65→                    this.treeNext?.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
66→            }
67→            ?: false
68→}
69→
70→public val NO_CONSECUTIVE_BLANK_LINES_RULE_ID: RuleId = NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule().ruleId
71→

content.thinking:
The fix looks correct. The change on line 65 adds a null-safe call `?.` to `this.treeNext` before accessing `elementType`. This way, if `treeNext` is null (as it is at the end of a file), the expression will evaluate to `false` instead of throwing an NPE.

Let me verify my test as well.

content.thinking:
Both the fix and the test look good. Let me summarize the changes:

1. **Root Cause**: In `NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt`, the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()` method was calling `this.treeNext.elementType` without checking if `treeNext` is null. When a class without a body (like `sealed class Hello`) is followed by consecutive blank lines at the end of the file, `treeNext` is null because there are no more nodes after the whitespace.

2. **Fix**: Changed `this.treeNext.elementType` to `this.treeNext?.elementType` on line 65. This null-safe call returns null when `treeNext` is null, and the comparison `null == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR` evaluates to `false`, preventing the NPE.

3. **Test**: Added a test case `Given a class without body followed by multiple blank lines at end of file then do return lint errors` that specifically tests the scenario from the bug report.

The fix is minimal and targeted - it just adds a null-safe call operator (`?.`) which is the idiomatic Kotlin way to handle potential null values.

content.text:
The fix is complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

## Summary

### Root Cause
In `NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt`, the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()` method was calling `this.treeNext.elementType` without checking if `treeNext` is null. When a class without a body (like `sealed class Hello`) is followed by consecutive blank lines at the end of the file, `treeNext` is null because there are no more nodes after the whitespace.

### Fix (line 65 of `NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt`)
Changed `this.treeNext.elementType` to `this.treeNext?.elementType`. This null-safe call returns null when `treeNext` is null, and the comparison `null == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR` evaluates to `false`, which is the correct behavior (the whitespace is NOT between a class and primary constructor - it's at the end of the file).

### Test Added
Added a test case that specifically tests the scenario from the bug report:
- Input: `sealed class Hello` followed by 3 blank lines and EOF
- Expected: Reports a lint violation for the needless blank lines
- Formatting: Reduces to a single trailing newline

1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.KtLintAssertThat.Companion.assertThatRule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.LintViolation
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.MULTILINE_STRING_QUOTE
  6→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Nested
  7→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
  8→
  9→class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleTest {
 10→    private val noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat = assertThatRule { NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule() }
 11→
 12→    @Test
 13→    fun `Given needless blank lines between declarations then do return lint errors`() {
 14→        val code =
 15→            """
 16→            package com.test
 17→
 18→
 19→            import com.test.util
 20→
 21→
 22→            val a = "a"
 23→
 24→
 25→            fun b() {
 26→            }
 27→
 28→
 29→            fun c()
 30→            """.trimIndent()
 31→        val formattedCode =
 32→            """
 33→            package com.test
 34→
 35→            import com.test.util
 36→
 37→            val a = "a"
 38→
 39→            fun b() {
 40→            }
 41→
 42→            fun c()
 43→            """.trimIndent()
 44→        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
 45→            .hasLintViolations(
 46→                LintViolation(3, 1, "Needless blank line(s)"),
 47→                LintViolation(6, 1, "Needless blank line(s)"),
 48→                LintViolation(9, 1, "Needless blank line(s)"),
 49→                LintViolation(13, 1, "Needless blank line(s)"),
 50→            ).isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    @Nested
 54→    inner class `Given some blank lines at the end of the file` {
 55→        @Test
 56→        fun `Given two blank lines at end of file then do return lint errors`() {
 57→            val code =
 58→                """
 59→                fun main() {
 60→                }
 61→
 62→
 63→                """.trimIndent()
 64→            val formattedCode =
 65→                """

 67→                }
 68→
 69→                """.trimIndent()
